reminders.subject: ⏰ Return Reminder: "shoes" due in 16 hours!
reminders.html:
Return Reminder ⏰

Hi ram,

This is your reminder to return "shoes" to Ajay Patel.

📅 Return deadline: 2026-02-22 (in ~16 hours)

⚠️ Late fine: ₹5/day if returned after the deadline.

Please return the item on time to avoid fines.


— CampusRent Team 🎓
